news.t: State Street Global Advisors Enhances SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite With New Low-Cost Dividend ETF

holdings.infoBox: SPDG is an equity ETF with a total of 279 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 7.80%, Verizon Communications at 5.82%, International Business Machines at 4.55%, Texas Instruments at 4.29%, and QUALCOMM at 4.05%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio S&P Sector Neutral Dividend ETF (SPDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund follows an index that is weighted by market capitalization, comprising US companies from the S&P 1500 Composite Index that have maintained or raised their dividends for at least seven consecutive years. SPDG was launched on Sep 11, 2023 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Sector-Neutral High Yield Dividend Aristocrats Index

data.title: State Street Global Advisors Enhances SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite With New Low-Cost Dividend ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Global Advisors, the asset management business of State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT), today announced the launch of the SPDR® Portfolio S&P Sector Neutral Divid...
